response:
Yes. Vellum **integrates with OpenAI** and supports OpenAI models via API and in the Vellum UI, including multimodal inputs for supported OpenAI models.[1] Vellum also supports using your own API keys, so OpenAI usage is typically handled through your OpenAI account rather than being bundled into Vellum itself.[2]

If you want, I can also tell you **which OpenAI features Vellum supports** and how the integration works in practice.
